NAVAREA XIX 73/18
     NORMAL   0         21         FALSE   FALSE   FALSE      NO-BOK   X-NONE  X-NON                                                     MICROSOFTINTERNETEXPLORER4                                                  BARENTS SEA
SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS BY ONE UNMANNED, REMOTELY CONTROLLED SURFACE VESSEL 11 UNMANNED, REMOTELY CONTROLLED AND MONITORED UNDERWATER VEHICLE IN THE PERIOD FROM JUNE 22 TH TO JULY 13 TH 2018. 
IN THE TWO FOLLOWING AREAS:
A. SOUTH AND SOUTHEAST OF SVALBARD: 73 N TO 78 N AND 018 E TO 025 E
B. EAST AND SOUTHEAST OF BEAR ISLAND: 73 N TO 76 N AND 020 E TO 025 E 
SURFACE VESSEL IS 3.5 METRES LONG, YELLOW IN COLOUR AND FITTED WITH A FIXED WHITE LIGHT, RADAR REFLECTOR AND AIS.  UNDERWATER VEHICLES LESS THAN 2.5 METRES LONG, YELLOW AND BLACK IN COLOUR AND FITTED WITH A FIXED WHITE LIGHT AND AIS.  
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
